response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience in C++ and has worked on various projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and some of the specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Experience with C++ and other programming languages
Strong background in software development and testing
Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Lack of direct experience in industrial automation
No clear experience with cloud technologies like Microsoft Azure
Not directly familiar with some of the specific protocols mentioned (e.g., Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850)
